segments.text: As he went out of the temple, one of his disciples said to him,
Teacher, see what kind of stones and what kind of buildings!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Jesus said to him,
Do you see these great buildings? There will not be left here one stone on another, which will not be thrown down.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As he sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter, James, John, and Andrew asked him privately,
Tell us, when will these things be? What is the sign that these things are all about to be fulfilled?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus, answering, began to tell them,
Be careful that no one leads you astray.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am he!’[^29] and will lead many astray.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “When you hear of wars and rumors of wars, don’t be troubled. For those must happen, but the end is not yet.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places. There will be famines and troubles. These things are the beginning of birth pains.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “But watch yourselves, for they will deliver you up to councils. You will be beaten in synagogues. You will st and before rulers and kings for my sake, for a testimony to them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The Good News must first be preached to all the nations.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When they lead you away and deliver you up, don’t be anxious beforehand or premeditate what you will say, but say whatever will be given you in that hour. For it is not you who speak, but the Holy Spirit.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Brother will deliver up brother to death, and the father his child. Children will rise up against parents and cause them to be put to death.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will be hated by all men for my name’s sake, but he who endures to the end will be saved.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “But when you see the abomination of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, standing where it ought not
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: (let the reader understand),
then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: and let him who is on the housetop not go down, nor enter in, to take anything out of his house.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Let him who is in the field not return back to take his cloak.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But woe to those who are with child and to those who nurse babies in those days!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Pray that your flight won’t be in the winter.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For in those days there will be oppression, such as there has not been the like from the beginning of the creation which God created until now, and never will be.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Unless the Lord had shortened the days, no flesh would have been saved; but for the sake of the chosen ones, whom he picked out, he shortened the days.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then if anyone tells you, ‘Look, here is the Christ!’ or, ‘Look, there!’ don’t believe it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For false christs and false prophets will arise and will show signs and wonders, that they may lead astray, if possible, even the chosen ones.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But you watch.“Behold, I have told you all things beforehand.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But in those days, after that oppression, the sun will be darkened, the moon will not give its light,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: the stars will be falling from the sky, and the powers that are in the heavens will be shaken.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then they will see the Son of Man coming in clouds with great power and glory.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then he will send out his angels, and will gather together his chosen ones from the four winds, from the ends of the earth to the ends of the sky.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “Now from the fig tree, learn this parable. When the branch has now become tender and produces its leaves, you know that the summer is near;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: even so you also, when you see these things coming to pass, know that it is near, at the doors.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Most certainly I say to you, this generation[^30] will not pass away until all these things happen.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “But of that day or that hour no one knows—not even the angels in heaven, nor the Son, but only the Father.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Watch, keep alert, and pray; for you don’t know when the time is.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: “It is like a man traveling to another country, having left his house and given authority to his servants, and to each one his work, and also commanded the doorkeeper to keep watch.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Watch therefore, for you don’t know when the lord of the house is coming—whether at evening, or at midnight, or when the rooster crows, or in the morning;
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: lest, coming suddenly, he might find you sleeping.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: What I tell you, I tell all: Watch!
segments.speaker: Jesus
